column17: Chart Designer: Dr. Thomas R. Nicely

column2: William Andrews sets a new club record with 1,567 yards rushing, as Quarterback Steve Bartkowski has another stellar season passing for 3,167 yards. However, the Falcons defense were burned for 389 points on the season and finish with a 7-9 record.

column1: 3 Includes positive “T1,” “T2” and “T3” yardage (expected values = 27.5, 55 and 82.5, respectively).
4 Includes all results that are not combined with defensive results, and override all defensive yardage
results except for those in square brackets.
